changeSet.author: samuelfangjw
changeSet.sql: UPDATE feedback_response_comments frc SET giver_type = 'STUDENT', giver_id = u.id FROM users u JOIN students s ON s.id = u.id JOIN feedback_responses fr ON true JOIN feedback_questions fq ON fq.id = fr.question_id JOIN feedback_sessions fs ON fs.id = fq.session_id WHERE fr.id = frc.response_id AND u.course_id = fs.course_id AND lower(u.email) = lower(frc.giver) AND frc.giver_id IS NULL;

changeSet.author: samuelfangjw
changeSet.sql: UPDATE feedback_response_comments frc SET giver_type = 'INSTRUCTOR', giver_id = u.id FROM users u JOIN instructors i ON i.id = u.id JOIN feedback_responses fr ON true JOIN feedback_questions fq ON fq.id = fr.question_id JOIN feedback_sessions fs ON fs.id = fq.session_id WHERE fr.id = frc.response_id AND u.course_id = fs.course_id AND lower(u.email) = lower(frc.giver) AND frc.giver_id IS NULL;

changeSet.author: samuelfangjw
changeSet.sql: UPDATE feedback_response_comments frc SET giver_type = 'TEAM', giver_id = t.id FROM teams t JOIN sections sec ON sec.id = t.section_id JOIN feedback_responses fr ON true JOIN feedback_questions fq ON fq.id = fr.question_id JOIN feedback_sessions fs ON fs.id = fq.session_id WHERE fr.id = frc.response_id AND sec.course_id = fs.course_id AND t.name = frc.giver AND frc.giver_id IS NULL;

changeSet.author: samuelfangjw
changeSet.sql: UPDATE feedback_response_comments frc SET last_edited_by_type = 'STUDENT', last_edited_by_id = u.id FROM users u JOIN students s ON s.id = u.id JOIN feedback_responses fr ON true JOIN feedback_questions fq ON fq.id = fr.question_id JOIN feedback_sessions fs ON fs.id = fq.session_id WHERE fr.id = frc.response_id AND u.course_id = fs.course_id AND lower(u.email) = lower(frc.last_editor_email) AND frc.last_editor_email IS NOT NULL AND frc.last_edited_by_id IS NULL;

changeSet.author: samuelfangjw
changeSet.sql: UPDATE feedback_response_comments frc SET last_edited_by_type = 'INSTRUCTOR', last_edited_by_id = u.id FROM users u JOIN instructors i ON i.id = u.id JOIN feedback_responses fr ON true JOIN feedback_questions fq ON fq.id = fr.question_id JOIN feedback_sessions fs ON fs.id = fq.session_id WHERE fr.id = frc.response_id AND u.course_id = fs.course_id AND lower(u.email) = lower(frc.last_editor_email) AND frc.last_editor_email IS NOT NULL AND frc.last_edited_by_id IS NULL;

changeSet.author: samuelfangjw
changeSet.sql: UPDATE feedback_response_comments frc SET last_edited_by_type = 'TEAM', last_edited_by_id = t.id FROM teams t JOIN sections sec ON sec.id = t.section_id JOIN feedback_responses fr ON true JOIN feedback_questions fq ON fq.id = fr.question_id JOIN feedback_sessions fs ON fs.id = fq.session_id WHERE fr.id = frc.response_id AND sec.course_id = fs.course_id AND t.name = frc.last_editor_email AND frc.last_editor_email IS NOT NULL AND frc.last_edited_by_id IS NULL;

changeSet.author: samuelfangjw
changeSet.sql: UPDATE feedback_response_comments SET last_edited_by_type = giver_type, last_edited_by_id = giver_id WHERE last_edited_by_id IS NULL AND giver_id IS NOT NULL;

rollback.sql: UPDATE feedback_response_comments frc SET giver = t.name FROM teams t WHERE frc.giver_type = 'TEAM' AND frc.giver_id = t.id;
UPDATE feedback_response_comments frc SET giver = u.email FROM users u WHERE frc.giver_type IN ('STUDENT', 'INSTRUCTOR') AND frc.giver_id = u.id;
UPDATE feedback_response_comments frc SET last_editor_email = t.name FROM teams t WHERE frc.last_edited_by_type = 'TEAM' AND frc.last_edited_by_id = t.id;
UPDATE feedback_response_comments frc SET last_editor_email = u.email FROM users u WHERE frc.last_edited_by_type IN ('STUDENT', 'INSTRUCTOR') AND frc.last_edited_by_id = u.id;
